# Business Model Canvas Template

## 🎯 Giới Thiệu Business Model Canvas

Business Model Canvas là công cụ strategic planning giúp bạn visualize, design và pivoting business model. Template này được optimize cho thị trường Việt Nam và tích hợp với AI Automation Platform workflow.

### 📋 Cách Sử Dụng
1. **Điền từng block** theo thứ tự suggested
2. **Validate assumptions** với customer interviews
3. **Input vào AI Platform** để generate business strategy
4. **Iterate based on** AI insights và market feedback

---

## 🏗️ Business Model Canvas Framework

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                           BUSINESS MODEL CANVAS                                 │
├─────────────────┬─────────────────┬─────────────────┬─────────────────────────────┤
│  KEY PARTNERS   │ KEY ACTIVITIES  │ VALUE PROPOSIT. │     CUSTOMER RELATIONS      │
│                 │                 │                 │                             │
│                 ├─────────────────┤                 ├─────────────────────────────┤
│                 │ KEY RESOURCES   │                 │     CHANNELS               │
├─────────────────┴─────────────────┤                 ├─────────────────────────────┤
│           COST STRUCTURE          │                 │     CUSTOMER SEGMENTS       │
│                                   │                 │                             │
└───────────────────────────────────┴─────────────────┴─────────────────────────────┘
│                              REVENUE STREAMS                                    │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 🎯 1. VALUE PROPOSITIONS (Đề Xuất Giá Trị)

### 1.1 Core Value Proposition
```
💡 VALUE PROPOSITION STATEMENT:
"Chúng tôi giúp [Customer Segment] 
giải quyết [Problem/Need] 
bằng cách [Solution/Product] 
để đạt được [Benefit/Outcome]."

Ví dụ:
"Chúng tôi giúp các gia đình bận rộn TP.HCM 
giải quyết nhu cầu bánh ngọt chất lượng cho dịp đặc biệt 
bằng cách cung cấp dịch vụ đặt bánh online với giao hàng tận nơi 
để tiết kiệm thời gian và đảm bảo chất lượng tươi ngon."
```

### 1.2 Value Elements
**Pain Relievers (Giảm Đau Đớn):**
- [ ] 🕒 Tiết kiệm thời gian: [Cụ thể như thế nào?]
- [ ] 💰 Tiết kiệm chi phí: [Bao nhiêu % so với alternatives?]
- [ ] 😰 Giảm stress: [Quy trình nào được simplify?]
- [ ] 🔧 Giải quyết khó khăn: [Problem nào được solve?]
- [ ] ⚡ Tăng hiệu quả: [Metrics cụ thể]

**Gain Creators (Tạo Lợi Ích):**
- [ ] 📈 Tăng doanh thu: [Specific revenue increase]
- [ ] 🏆 Nâng cao chất lượng: [Quality improvements]
- [ ] 🌟 Trải nghiệm tốt hơn: [Experience enhancements]
- [ ] 📊 Insights và data: [Analytics benefits]
- [ ] 🚀 Competitive advantage: [Differentiation factors]

**Products & Services:**
- [ ] 🛍️ Core product: [Main offering]
- [ ] 🔧 Supporting services: [Additional services]
- [ ] 💻 Digital features: [Technology components]
- [ ] 🏪 Physical components: [Tangible elements]
- [ ] 📞 Customer support: [Service levels]

### 1.3 Vietnamese Market Adaptation
```
🇻🇳 VIETNAMESE VALUE DRIVERS:
- [ ] Family-oriented: Sản phẩm/dịch vụ phục vụ cả gia đình
- [ ] Quality assurance: Cam kết chất lượng trong văn hóa VN
- [ ] Convenience: Phù hợp với lifestyle busy của urban VN
- [ ] Trust building: Establish credibility trong market
- [ ] Local relevance: Hiểu và phục vụ Vietnamese preferences

🎯 CULTURAL CONSIDERATIONS:
- Face-saving: Không làm khách hàng mất mặt
- Relationship: Focus on long-term customer relationships  
- Community: Word-of-mouth và social proof important
- Respect: Professional service với cultural sensitivity
- Value for money: Vietnamese consumers price-conscious
```

---

## 👥 2. CUSTOMER SEGMENTS (Phân Khúc Khách Hàng)

### 2.1 Primary Customer Segment
```
👤 SEGMENT 1: [Gia đình trẻ TP.HCM]

Demographics:
- Age: [25-40 tuổi]
- Gender: [60% nữ, 40% nam]
- Income: [15-50 triệu VNĐ/tháng]
- Location: [TP.HCM, các quận trung tâm]
- Education: [Đại học trở lên]
- Occupation: [Nhân viên văn phòng, quản lý middle]
- Family: [Có con nhỏ, married couples]

Psychographics:
- Lifestyle: [Bận rộn, modern lifestyle]
- Values: [Gia đình, chất lượng, tiện lợi]
- Interests: [Ẩm thực, du lịch, công nghệ]
- Personality: [Practical, quality-focused]
- Attitudes: [Open to new technology, brand loyal]

Behavioral:
- Shopping behavior: [Research online, buy online/offline]
- Technology adoption: [Early adopters, smartphone primary]
- Decision making: [Compare options, influenced by reviews]
- Communication: [Facebook, Zalo, Google search]
- Spending: [Willing to pay premium for quality]
```

### 2.2 Secondary Customer Segments
```
👤 SEGMENT 2: [Sinh viên & Young professionals]
- Age: 18-28, income: 3-15 triệu VNĐ/tháng
- Price sensitive, convenience focused
- Social media heavy users

👤 SEGMENT 3: [Corporate customers]
- B2B orders, events, office parties
- Volume purchases, scheduled orders
- Quality và reliability focused

👤 SEGMENT 4: [Affluent families]
- High-income households (50M+ VNĐ/tháng)
- Premium quality demand
- Special occasions focus
```

### 2.3 Customer Jobs, Pains & Gains
```
💼 CUSTOMER JOBS:
Functional Jobs:
- [ ] Find quality baked goods cho special occasions
- [ ] Order convenience food cho busy weekdays
- [ ] Plan và organize family celebrations
- [ ] Maintain social status trong community

Emotional Jobs:
- [ ] Feel good about providing quality cho family
- [ ] Express love và care through food
- [ ] Create memorable experiences
- [ ] Build và maintain relationships

Social Jobs:
- [ ] Impress guests với quality offerings
- [ ] Participate in community events
- [ ] Share experiences on social media
- [ ] Maintain face trong social circles

😰 CUSTOMER PAINS:
- [ ] Limited time để shop for quality items
- [ ] Inconsistent quality từ different suppliers
- [ ] Difficulty finding authentic Vietnamese flavors
- [ ] High prices tại premium bakeries
- [ ] Poor delivery service reliability
- [ ] Language barriers với international brands

😊 CUSTOMER GAINS:
- [ ] Save time on shopping và preparation
- [ ] Access to consistent quality products
- [ ] Convenience of home delivery
- [ ] Variety of options to choose from
- [ ] Ability to plan ahead cho events
- [ ] Social recognition for good taste
```

---

## 📞 3. CHANNELS (Kênh Phân Phối)

### 3.1 Channel Strategy
```
🌐 DIGITAL CHANNELS:
Primary:
- [ ] Website/E-commerce platform (70% of orders)
- [ ] Mobile app (20% of orders)
- [ ] Social media (Facebook, Instagram) (5%)
- [ ] Call center/Phone orders (5%)

Secondary:
- [ ] Email marketing
- [ ] SMS notifications
- [ ] WhatsApp business
- [ ] Zalo official account

🏪 PHYSICAL CHANNELS:
- [ ] Retail storefront (flagship location)
- [ ] Pop-up stores tại events
- [ ] Partner locations (cafes, offices)
- [ ] Delivery hubs
```

### 3.2 Channel Functions
```
📢 AWARENESS:
- [ ] Social media advertising (Facebook, Instagram)
- [ ] Google Ads (Search, Display)
- [ ] Content marketing (Blog, YouTube)
- [ ] Word-of-mouth campaigns
- [ ] Local events và sponsorships

🛒 EVALUATION:
- [ ] Website product catalogs
- [ ] Customer reviews và ratings
- [ ] Free samples/tasting events
- [ ] Social proof (testimonials, user photos)
- [ ] Comparison tools và guides

💳 PURCHASE:
- [ ] E-commerce checkout flow
- [ ] Mobile app ordering
- [ ] Phone order processing
- [ ] In-store point-of-sale
- [ ] Corporate ordering portal

🚚 DELIVERY:
- [ ] Own delivery team (local areas)
- [ ] Third-party logistics (Grab, Giao Hàng Nhanh)
- [ ] Customer pickup options
- [ ] Scheduled delivery windows
- [ ] Express delivery premium service

🔧 AFTER-SALES:
- [ ] Customer service hotline
- [ ] Live chat support
- [ ] Email support system
- [ ] Social media customer care
- [ ] Return/refund processing
```

### 3.3 Vietnamese Channel Optimization
```
🇻🇳 LOCAL CHANNEL PREFERENCES:
- [ ] Facebook: Primary social platform trong VN
- [ ] Zalo: Popular messaging app integration
- [ ] Banking apps: Convenient payment methods
- [ ] Motorbike delivery: Standard trong urban VN
- [ ] Cash on delivery: Still preferred by many

📱 MOBILE-FIRST APPROACH:
- [ ] 78% Vietnamese users mobile-primary
- [ ] Touch-optimized interface design
- [ ] Fast loading on 3G/4G networks
- [ ] Offline browsing capabilities
- [ ] Voice search trong Vietnamese
```

---

## 💰 4. REVENUE STREAMS (Dòng Doanh Thu)

### 4.1 Revenue Model
```
💵 PRIMARY REVENUE STREAMS:

1. PRODUCT SALES (80% of revenue)
   - Fresh baked goods: [Average order 200K VNĐ]
   - Custom cakes: [Average order 800K VNĐ]  
   - Packaged items: [Average order 150K VNĐ]
   - Seasonal specials: [Premium pricing 20-30%]

2. DELIVERY FEES (15% of revenue)
   - Standard delivery: [25K VNĐ within 5km]
   - Express delivery: [50K VNĐ same-day]
   - Scheduled delivery: [35K VNĐ advance booking]
   - Free delivery: [Orders >300K VNĐ]

3. PREMIUM SERVICES (5% of revenue)
   - Custom decoration: [100-500K VNĐ extra]
   - Event planning consultation: [200K VNĐ/hour]
   - Bulk corporate discounts: [10-15% volume]
   - Membership program: [200K VNĐ annual fee]
```

### 4.2 Pricing Strategy
```
💰 PRICING MODEL:
- [ ] Cost-plus pricing: [30-40% margin on ingredients]
- [ ] Value-based pricing: [Premium for convenience]
- [ ] Competitive pricing: [Match hoặc 10% below competitors]
- [ ] Dynamic pricing: [Peak times, seasonal demand]
- [ ] Bundle pricing: [Package deals, combos]

🎯 PRICE POINTS:
Tier 1 - Budget Friendly:
- Individual pastries: 15-25K VNĐ
- Simple cakes: 150-300K VNĐ
- Basic delivery: 25K VNĐ

Tier 2 - Premium Quality:
- Artisan items: 35-60K VNĐ
- Custom cakes: 500K-1.5M VNĐ
- Express delivery: 50K VNĐ

Tier 3 - Luxury/Events:
- Designer cakes: 1.5M+ VNĐ
- Full event catering: 5M+ VNĐ
- White-glove service: 100K+ VNĐ
```

### 4.3 Revenue Optimization
```
📈 GROWTH STRATEGIES:
- [ ] Cross-selling: Suggest complementary items
- [ ] Upselling: Premium ingredients/decorations
- [ ] Subscription model: Weekly/monthly boxes
- [ ] Corporate contracts: Regular office orders
- [ ] Franchise opportunities: Expansion model

💳 PAYMENT OPTIMIZATION:
- [ ] Multiple payment options: Reduce cart abandonment
- [ ] Installment payments: Cho expensive orders
- [ ] Corporate billing: Net 30 cho B2B customers
- [ ] Loyalty rewards: Encourage repeat purchases
```

---

```
- [ ] New product line development
- [ ] Geographic expansion planning
- [ ] Competitive intelligence

📊 DATA & ANALYTICS:
- [ ] Customer behavior analysis
- [ ] Sales performance tracking
- [ ] Operational efficiency monitoring
- [ ] Financial planning và forecasting
- [ ] Market trend analysis
```

## 💸 8. COST STRUCTURE (Cơ Cấu Chi Phí)

### 8.1 Cost Categories
```
💰 DIRECT COSTS (50-60% of revenue):
- [ ] Raw materials: [25-30%]
- [ ] Packaging: [3-5%]
- [ ] Direct labor: [15-20%]
- [ ] Delivery costs: [5-8%]

🏢 OVERHEAD COSTS (25-35% of revenue):
- [ ] Rent (kitchen, store, office): [8-12%]
- [ ] Utilities: [2-3%]
- [ ] Insurance: [1-2%]
- [ ] Equipment depreciation: [3-5%]
- [ ] Administrative staff: [8-12%]

📱 TECHNOLOGY COSTS (3-8% of revenue):
- [ ] Platform subscription: [1-2%]
- [ ] Website hosting: [0.5%]
- [ ] Software licenses: [1-2%]
- [ ] Digital marketing: [2-5%]

📊 MARKETING COSTS (5-15% of revenue):
- [ ] Digital advertising: [3-8%]
- [ ] Content creation: [1-2%]
- [ ] Events và promotions: [2-3%]
- [ ] Public relations: [1-2%]
```

### 8.2 Cost Optimization
```
📉 COST REDUCTION STRATEGIES:
- [ ] Bulk purchasing for ingredients
- [ ] Energy-efficient equipment
- [ ] Optimal staff scheduling
- [ ] Route optimization for delivery
- [ ] Waste reduction programs

📈 SCALING ECONOMIES:
- [ ] Fixed cost absorption as volume grows
- [ ] Better supplier terms với higher volumes
- [ ] Technology efficiency improvements
- [ ] Process automation opportunities
```

---

## 💕 9. CUSTOMER RELATIONSHIPS (Mối Quan Hệ Khách Hàng)

### 9.1 Relationship Types
```
🤝 RELATIONSHIP STRATEGIES:

PERSONAL SERVICE:
- [ ] Dedicated account managers cho corporate clients
- [ ] Custom consultation for special events
- [ ] Personal shopping assistance
- [ ] Birthday và anniversary reminders

SELF-SERVICE:
- [ ] User-friendly website với easy ordering
- [ ] Mobile app với order tracking
- [ ] FAQ và help section
- [ ] Online customer account management

COMMUNITY BUILDING:
- [ ] Social media engagement
- [ ] Customer loyalty program
- [ ] Referral rewards program
- [ ] User-generated content campaigns

AUTOMATED SERVICES:
- [ ] Order confirmation emails
- [ ] Delivery notifications
- [ ] Birthday offers
- [ ] Reorder reminders
```

### 9.2 Vietnamese Relationship Building
```
🇻🇳 CULTURAL RELATIONSHIP ELEMENTS:
- [ ] Respect và courtesy trong all interactions
- [ ] Long-term relationship focus vs transaction
- [ ] Face-saving trong problem resolution
- [ ] Family-oriented communication style
- [ ] Community involvement và social responsibility

📱 VIETNAMESE COMMUNICATION PREFERENCES:
- [ ] Zalo messaging for quick updates
- [ ] Facebook for community engagement
- [ ] Phone calls cho complex issues
- [ ] In-person meetings cho important decisions
```

---

## 📊 10. VALIDATION & TESTING

### 10.1 Assumption Testing
```
🧪 KEY ASSUMPTIONS TO TEST:
1. CUSTOMER DEMAND:
   - Assumption: Families will pay premium for convenience
   - Test: Survey 100 target customers
   - Success metric: >60% express purchase intent

2. PRICING ACCEPTANCE:
   - Assumption: 200K average order value
   - Test: A/B test different price points
   - Success metric: <20% cart abandonment

3. DELIVERY EXPECTATIONS:
   - Assumption: Same-day delivery is valued
   - Test: Offer different delivery options
   - Success metric: >30% choose express delivery

4. QUALITY STANDARDS:
   - Assumption: Quality is more important than price
   - Test: Customer interviews và product testing
   - Success metric: >4.5/5 quality rating
```

### 10.2 Market Validation
```
📈 VALIDATION METHODS:
- [ ] Customer interviews (minimum 20)
- [ ] Online surveys (minimum 200 responses)
- [ ] Focus groups (3 groups of 8-10 people)
- [ ] Pilot testing với limited customer base
- [ ] A/B testing của key features

📊 SUCCESS METRICS:
- [ ] Customer acquisition cost <100K VNĐ
- [ ] Customer lifetime value >800K VNĐ
- [ ] Monthly repeat purchase rate >40%
- [ ] Net Promoter Score >8
- [ ] Break-even within 6 months
```

---

## 🚀 11. IMPLEMENTATION ROADMAP

### 11.1 MVP Definition
```
🎯 MINIMUM VIABLE PRODUCT:
Essential Features:
- [ ] Basic product catalog (20 core items)
- [ ] Simple ordering system
- [ ] Payment processing (VNPAY + COD)
- [ ] Basic delivery scheduling
- [ ] Customer contact system

Success Criteria:
- [ ] 50 orders/month within 3 months
- [ ] 4+ star average rating
- [ ] <5% order cancellation rate
- [ ] Positive unit economics
```

### 11.2 Growth Phases
```
📈 PHASE 1 (Months 1-6): LOCAL PRESENCE
- Target: 200 orders/month
- Focus: Local delivery trong 5km radius
- Revenue target: 50M VNĐ/month

📈 PHASE 2 (Months 7-12): SCALE UP
- Target: 800 orders/month
- Focus: Expand delivery area, add product lines
- Revenue target: 160M VNĐ/month

📈 PHASE 3 (Year 2): MARKET LEADER
- Target: 2000 orders/month
- Focus: Multiple locations, corporate clients
- Revenue target: 400M VNĐ/month
```

---

## ✅ Business Model Canvas Summary

### Quick Reference
```
VALUE PROPOSITION: [One sentence summary]
CUSTOMER SEGMENT: [Primary target description]
REVENUE MODEL: [Main revenue stream + pricing]
KEY METRICS: [3-5 most important KPIs]
COMPETITIVE ADVANTAGE: [What makes you different]
FUNDING REQUIRED: [Capital needed for launch]
BREAK-EVEN: [Timeline to profitability]
```

### Next Steps with AI Platform
```
🤖 AI INTEGRATION:
1. Input this canvas into Business Analysis Agent
2. Let Strategy Agent refine và optimize
3. Use insights to improve assumptions
4. Generate detailed business plan
5. Create financial projections
6. Develop go-to-market strategy
```

---

*Business Model Canvas này sẽ serve as foundation cho AI Platform để generate comprehensive business strategy. Make sure to validate assumptions trước khi proceeding với full development!* 🎯
